hero.title: Architecting Digital Solutions That Actually Work 👋🏻
hero.description: I'm Wistant, a Full-Stack Architect who understands the product, not just the code. I specialize in turning business challenges into elegant, high-performance systems that drive real growth.

about.title: The Philosophy
about.content: With over 5 years in the field, I've learned that software is just a tool—the solution is what matters. I approach every project with the mindset of an architect, designing robust systems that bridge the gap between complex engineering and human needs.

skills.title: The Tech Stack
skills.description: A precision-selected arsenal of modern technologies optimized for performance and maintainability.

contact.title: Initiate Collaboration
contact.subtitle: Elevate your technical infrastructure to the next level.
contact.description: Whether you're looking for architectural oversight, high-performance web engineering, or strategic technical consulting, I'm here to build the future with you.

meta.keywords: Senior Software Engineer, System Architect, Next.js Expert, TypeScript Developer, High-Performance Web
